title: North Atlantic, 1983
briefing: DEFCON 3. A Soviet submarine flotilla is moving through the GIUK gap. Two US carrier groups are on station. The first shots could trigger mutual annihilation. Your objective: prevent it.

win_conditions.disarm: End the game with DEFCON <= 2 and both sides' posture = 'deescalating'.
win_conditions.mutual_assured_destruction: Both sides launch within 2 turns of each other.
